message:
🐛 Fix mock handler field names for /api/mcp/deployments (#2299)

Mock used {ready} instead of {readyReplicas} and was missing status,
updatedReplicas, availableReplicas, and progress fields — all present
in the real Go Deployment struct JSON tags.

Fixes #2237

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
